name: GraniteShares Gold Trust
business: GraniteShares Gold Trust is a passive investment vehicle that issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interest in gold bullion. Its objective is to reflect the value of gold held by the trust less expenses. The trust sells these shares to investors through brokerage accounts.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The purpose of the GraniteShares Gold Trust (the Trust) is to own gold transferred to the Trust in exchange for shares issued by the Trust (Shares).
